message:
feat(wills-estate/viz): wire deliverable-mode summary + skill-catalog link into DeliverablesTreeViz

Two small UX additions on the deliverables tree visualization in the
wills & estate article.

- `DELIVERABLE_SKILL_CATALOG_HREF` centralizes the target URL for
  the skill's catalog entry on jeffreys-skills.md, used by the
  tree's "Open in catalog" affordance (the rendering of which was
  already landed; this commit gives the visual a stable href to
  link against).
- `summarizeDeliverableModes(modes)` produces a compact
  `{ label, title }` pair for chip rendering:
    * leaves tagged with "core" only → returns `null` (no chip).
    * a single non-core mode → `Mode: <label>` with the full label
      in `title` for a tooltip read.
    * multiple non-core modes → `Mode: <first>+<N>` label with the
      full comma-separated list as `title` so the overflow is
      discoverable without eating chip real estate.

Still no behaviour change on the index / hero surfaces that consume
the viz; only the deliverables tree rendering gets richer metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
